name: Canadian Lakes
description: Canadian Lakes is a place to play pickleball in Canadian Lakes, MI. There are 8 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private.
fees: Private — Must be a Canadian Lakes Property Owner or Guest

name: Ferris State University Racquet Center
description: Ferris State University Racquet Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Big Rapids, MI. There are 8 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food, restrooms, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Hemlock Park
description: Hemlock Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Big Rapids, MI. There are 8 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Mecosta Rec Center
description: Mecosta Rec Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mecosta, MI. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Morley Community Center
description: Morley Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Morley, MI. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
